use_cases: Triggering form submissions in multi-step wizards
Navigating between form steps with primary/secondary actions
Destructive actions like cancel or delete in form workflows
ai_summary: A reusable button component with multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon). Built with Radix UI Slot for composition, CVA for variant handling, and standard Tailwind ring styling for accessibility. Suitable for multi-step form navigation and action triggers.
